The paper is definitively confirmed across multiple authoritative sources. The full title is "Manipulation of Voting Schemes: A General Result," authored by Allan Gibbard, published in *Econometrica*, Volume 41, Issue 4, July 1973, pp. 587–601. The cited title is a minor shortening of the real title (omitting "A General Result"), and the author, venue, and year all match exactly. The automated checkers' failure to find it is likely due to the slight title truncation.

EXPLANATION: The paper exists and is confirmed by the Econometric Society's own website, Semantic Scholar, IDEAS/RePEc, and multiple other sources as "Manipulation of Voting Schemes: A General Result" by Allan Gibbard, published in Econometrica Vol. 41(4), 1973, pp. 587–601. The cited title is a minor truncation of the full title; all other metadata match exactly.
